issues.detail: The skill only handles content filtering errors and does not cover other error scenarios such as authentication failures or quota limits.
Examples are limited to Python and Node.js, implying minor platform assumptions.

scenarios.name: managed-identity-auth
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B omits the required AzureOpenAI client, token provider, and api_version usage.

scenarios.name: function-calling-example
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits the required tools array, tool_choice handling, and conversation updates.
